---
name: Bug report
about: Report a new bug in the application
title: "[Bug]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''
type: Bug

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. 

**Pre-conditions**
List all the pre-conditions required to reproduce this bug. e.g. Have a configuration set up, have at least one evaluation process, etc.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots and other media**
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your problem.

**Environment details**
 - Environment: [e.g. local, staging, prod]
 - Browser [e.g. chrome, safari]

**Workaround**
If there is any workaround available, please describe it here.
